title: Open Association Tournament

sections.heading: Tournament Details
sections.content:
Annual Open Association Tournament featuring singles, doubles, and team events.

  • Date: January 10–11 / 17–18, 2026
  • Location: Rolling Thunder Lanes, Neenah
  • Entry Fee: See entry form
  • Status: Completed
  • Contact: Beth Kosiorek — bethkusbc@gmail.com
